2251230.name: Citadel Stormer 2 Demo
2251230.description:
'CITADEL STORMER 2' is an explosive 2D action platformer in which you must save the world from the clutches of a tyrannical AI. Use your wits and arsenal of weapons to blast away killer robots. Overcome deadly hazards and insta-kill traps. Collect vital supplies and items. Most importantly, be the hero in this epic battle for the fate of mankind!

This demo lets you experience the game's first chapter in it's entirety. We're talking six large levels and a boss fight, exactly as they appear in the full game! Give it a try!
2251230.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
